title: pelargonium buffonianum
intro: Pelargonium buffonianum, also known as Resurrection Plant, is a succulent plant species native to the southwestern coast of South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium buffonianum include its potential to lower blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of the common cold, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
